_comment: Template only. Copy to $CLIENT_OPS_CONFIG (default: ~/.config/runn/client-ops.config.json) and fill in real values. The real file MUST NOT be committed — see .gitignore. The 'sites' keys are the logical labels the model sees ('A', 'B', 'RECEIVER', …); the values are resolved server-side and never reach the model's context. Optional per-site fields (vm_name, service_port, service_host, db_path, db_gstat_cmd) are read by the vm_liveness / db_health_check tools; sites that don't set them simply can't be probed by those tools.
